item_text: signup -> register — type=message; label="register"; explanation="user sends email and password to server to register account"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-signup-005 title: registration with existing email module: signup source pages: 1 preconditions: user attempts to register with an email already in use. test data: - email: test@example.com - password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter "test@example.com" as the email. 2. enter "testpassword" as the password. 3. click on the "register" button. expected result: the system returns an error message indicating that the email is already registered.

item_text: profile -> updateprofile — type=message; label="updateprofile"; explanation="user sends username and profile data to server to update profile"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profile-001 title: successful profile update module: profile source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in and has valid profile data. test data: - username: testuser - profiledata: {"name": "john doe", "age": 30} test steps: 1. navigate to the profile page. 2. enter "john doe" as the name. 3. enter "30" as the age. 4. click on the "updateprofile" button. expected result: the user's profile is successfully updated and saved.

item_text: exit -> exit — type=message; label="exit"; explanation="user sends exit reason to server to end session"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-exit-001 title: successful exit module: exit source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - exitreason: "finished using the application" test steps: 1. click on the "exit" button. 2. enter "finished using the application" as the exit reason. 3. confirm the exit. expected result: the user's session is terminated, and they are logged out.

item_text: flow 1: user enters username and password -> login -> authenticate -> user is authenticated
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: successful login module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter "testuser" as the username. 2. enter "testpassword" as the password. 3. click on the "authenticate" button. expected result: the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard.

item_text: flow 2: user enters email and password -> signup -> register -> user is registered
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-signup-001 title: successful signup module: signup source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid email and password. test data: - email: test@example.com - password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter "test@example.com" as the email. 2. enter "testpassword" as the password. 3. click on the "register" button. expected result: the user is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

item_text: flow 3: user navigates to profile page -> profile -> updateprofile -> user's profile is updated
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profile-001 title: successful profile update module: profile source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in and has valid profile data. test data: - username: testuser - profiledata: {"name": "john doe", "age": 30} test steps: 1. navigate to the profile page. 2. enter "john doe" as the name. 3. enter "30" as the age. 4. click on the "updateprofile" button. expected result: the user's profile is successfully updated and saved.

item_text: flow 4: user decides to exit -> exit -> exit
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-exit-001 title: successful exit module: exit source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - exitreason: "finished using the application" test steps: 1. click on the "exit" button. 2. enter "finished using the application" as the exit reason. 3. confirm the exit. expected result: the user's session is terminated, and they are logged out.
